materials.name: AMBROX DL PR AMBROX DL COEUR
ARGAN OIL
materials.notes: No acute 2026 event, but real ongoing STRUCTURAL supply risk: chronic multi-year drought reducing argan fruit yield, compounded by overharvesting and a fragmented supply chain that keeps farmgate prices volatile even as retail prices stay high.

materials.name: BASIL OIL (METHYLCHAVICOL TYPE) METHYL EUGENOL FREE
Black Pepper Oil
materials.notes: No acute disruption identified as of June 2026. Note a real structural interlink: Indonesian farmers (esp. Sulawesi) shift distillation infrastructure between Patchouli and Clove oil depending on seasonal clove-bud harvest timing, so the two materials are not fully independent in supply.

materials.name: CARDAMOM ABSOLUTE
materials.notes: No major acute disruption as of mid-June 2026 - black pepper and cardamom prices reported stable-to-easing in domestic/export markets. Ongoing structural issue: Indian exporters report a container shortage and rising freight costs affecting spice exports broadly (logistics cost pressure, not a supply/crop event).

materials.name: CHAMOMILE ABS MATRICARIA NAT
materials.notes: No acute supply/crop disruption identified. Real current logistics/compliance risk: mandatory digital customs system (Nafeza/ACI) can strand unfamiliar suppliers shipments at port for weeks with fines.

materials.name: CISTULATE   DO NOT USE IN NEW
CLARITONE (Symrise 600285) DO NOT USE IN NEW
CLOVE TERPENES
materials.notes: Madagascar (Sava region, ~80% of world vanilla supply) hit by Cyclone Gezani, Feb 2026 - landfall as Cat 3 equivalent, ~$2B damage, 59 dead in-country. Came 10 days after Cyclone Fytia. Vanilla orchids take ~4 years to reach harvest, so repeated storm damage compounds across seasons. Clove (same Sava region) likely faces logistics/labor disruption even though the plant itself is less storm-fragile than vanilla vines.
